hero.title: Health Intelligence
hero.subtitle: Kwar-AI develops solutions that connect epidemiology, data science and artificial intelligence to support faster and more informed public health decisions.
hero.additionalLine: Among our solutions is EpidBot, an AI assistant for health data analysis in natural language.

story.paragraph1: Long before algorithms existed, the Tupi people already understood something essential: the future leaves signs in the present. For them,
story.kuaraySuffix: — the sun — was not just light, but cycle. Dawn was not a surprise; it was a consequence of patterns observed with attention.
story.paragraph2: The shamans didn't guess. They recognized signs. Before the rain, the wind changed. Before scarcity, movements altered. Before disease spread, the environment already indicated imbalance. There were signs — and there were those who knew how to read them.
story.kwarAiSuffix: is born from this same logic. It is a strategic light for public health decisions.
story.paragraph4: Epidemics don't start when they become news. They form silently, leaving traces in environmental, epidemiological and behavioral data. What seems like isolated noise can reveal a trend when analyzed together. Our work is to identify these convergences before they become crises.
story.paragraph5Suffix: , with a simple conviction: outbreaks announce their own arrival. Epidemiological intelligence is the ability to recognize this announcement in time to act.
story.quote: The sun rises for everyone. But

card.title: Ancestral Wisdom. Scientific Intelligence.
card.descriptionSuffix: combines the ancestral logic of observing signs with the rigor of statistical modeling and data science. It doesn't interpret omens — it analyzes environmental, epidemiological and behavioral data to turn signs into anticipatory and responsible decisions.

pillars.title: Our Pillars
pillars.subtitle: The philosophy that guides our work.

renewal.title: Renewal
renewal.description: Models that continuously learn from new data, adapting to environmental, behavioral and epidemiological changes.

clarity.title: Clarity
clarity.description: Complex analyzes translated into actionable intelligence — so strategic decisions are made with confidence.

cyclicity.title: Cyclicity
cyclicity.description: Diseases follow seasonal and predictable dynamics. We map these cycles with statistical rigor.

anticipation.title: Anticipation
anticipation.description: We identify early risk signals and issue alerts in advance — when there's still time to act.

managers.title: For Managers
managers.quote: You don't need to guess. You need data that anticipates.

doctors.title: For Doctors
doctors.quote: Know where the next wave will hit before it arrives.

society.title: For Society
society.quote: Prevention is light. Reaction is darkness.

clarezaDados.title: Data exists.
clarezaDados.subtitle: Public databases grow every year. Systems accumulate notifications, hospitalizations, deaths and environmental indicators. But turning that volume into actionable understanding still requires time, technical team and infrastructure.

fragmentation.title: Data Fragmentation
fragmentation.description: Information dispersed across multiple systems and incompatible formats

technical.title: Technical Complexity
technical.description: Statistical analysis requires specialized programming knowledge

team.title: Lack of Team
team.description: Shortage of professionals skilled in health data analysis

time.title: Response Time
time.description: Delay between data collection and generating actionable insights

clarezaDados.quote: More data doesn't mean more clarity.
clarezaDados.quoteSub: The difference is in how you analyze it.

paraQuem.title: Designed for those working with public health

epidBot.title: EpidBot
epidBot.subtitle: Epidemiological intelligence in natural language.
epidBot.description:
EpidBot is an artificial intelligence assistant designed to explore epidemiological data using natural language.

You ask questions as you would to an analyst — and the system automatically generates analyzes, summaries and insights.

No programming knowledge or complex data analysis tools required.

epidBotParaQuem.title: Who is EpidBot for
epidBotParaQuem.subtitle: Designed for professionals and institutions working with health data.

healthDepartments.title: Health Departments
healthDepartments.description: Support for analyzes and technical reports for strategic decisions.

surveillance.description: Synthesis of signals and trends in real time.

epidBotBeneficios.title: What EpidBot enables
epidBotBeneficios.subtitle: Features designed to transform how you work with data.

conversational.title: Explore data in natural language
conversational.description: Ask questions as you would to an experienced analyst.

synthesis.title: Generate automatic summaries and reports
synthesis.description: Create bulletins, technical notes and structured documents.

patterns.title: Identify patterns and trends

integration.title: Integrate multiple databases
integration.description: Combine data from different sources into a single analysis.

decision.title: Support decision making

visualization.description: Charts and maps that facilitate understanding.

linguagemNatural.title: Natural Language
linguagemNatural.description: Ask questions in Portuguese, English or Spanish and receive structured analyzes based on official data and statistical models.
linguagemNatural.chatExample: Show the evolution of dengue cases in São Paulo in the last 6 months

baseCientifica.title: Scientific base and integrated projects
baseCientifica.description: EpidBot is born from the accumulated experience in projects like PySUS, Infodengue and Mosqlimate, integrating statistical modeling, epidemiological surveillance and applied data science.

capacitacao.title: AI training applied to health
capacitacao.description: Beyond technological solutions, we offer training programs for technical teams and institutions that want to apply AI in real surveillance and decision-making contexts.

formacao.title: AI training applied to health data analysis
formacao.subtitle: Training programs developed for professionals and institutions working with epidemiological surveillance, data analysis and public health information production.
formacao.description: Kwar-AI offers training programs in artificial intelligence applied to epidemiological data analysis, technical report production and organization of large volumes of health information.
formacao.description2: Courses are oriented towards practical application in institutional contexts, enabling teams to use modern AI tools to accelerate analyses, interpret databases and support decision-making processes.

topics.topic1: Use of AI for analysis and synthesis of epidemiological reports
topics.topic2: Exploration of health databases (DATASUS, SINAN and other public sources)
topics.topic3: Assisted generation of reports and technical notes
topics.topic4: Extraction and organization of data from documents and spreadsheets
topics.topic5: Creation of AI assistants for health information query and analysis

cta.title: New class coming soon
cta.description: We are preparing new cohorts for the AI training program applied to health data analysis.

equipe.title: Who leads Kwar-AI
equipe.subtitle: A team with solid scientific foundation and experience in epidemiological modeling.

flavio.name: Flávio Codeço Coelho
flavio.bio: Professor at FGV EMAp, creator of PySUS and collaborator on projects like Infodengue and Mosqlimate. Specialist in mathematical modeling of epidemics.

joyce.name: Joyce Figueiró Braga
joyce.bio: PhD candidate in Applied Mathematics and Data Science. Works at the interface between epidemiological modeling, product strategy and training.

fabiana.name: Fabiana Ganem
fabiana.bio: Postdoctoral researcher at FGV EMAp. Works in epidemiological surveillance, statistical modeling and arbovirus prediction.

equipeRede.title: Team and Collaboration Network
equipeRede.subtitle: Kwar-AI is led by a founding core and operates in collaboration with a multidisciplinary network.
equipeRede.description: Today, Kwar-AI is driven by a founding team with solid scientific and technological foundation. To develop and apply solutions in public health, we work with researchers, developers and partner institutions in Brazil and abroad.
